and AccountCode = '60000'

 select *

select  BalanceAmount,accountcode,branchcode,companyid,ledgerid,departmentid,marketingaccountid,productid,finperiodid
 from OUT.CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE
where FinPeriodID ='06-2024'
and AccountCode = '10000'
order by accountcode,branchcode,companyid,ledgerid,departmentid,marketingaccountid,productid,finperiodid


select BalanceAmount,accountcode,branchcode,companyid,ledgerid,departmentid,marketingaccountid,productid,finperiodid
FROM [OUT].[CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_NEW] 
where FinPeriodID ='11-2024'
and AccountCode = '60000'
order by accountcode,branchcode,companyid,ledgerid,departmentid,marketingaccountid,productid,finperiodid

select sum(BalanceAmount)
FROM [OUT].[CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_NEW] 
where FinPeriodID ='11-2024'
and AccountCode = '60000'




select  sum(BalanceAmount),companyid
 from OUT.CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE
where FinPeriodID ='11-2024'
and AccountCode = '60000'
group by companyid

select sum(BalanceAmount),companyid
FROM [OUT].[CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_NEW] 
where FinPeriodID ='11-2024'
and AccountCode = '60000'
group by companyid


 select FinPeriodID,COUNT(*)
FROM [OUT].[CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_NEW] 
where FinPeriodID IN ('06-2024','07-2024','08-2024','09-2024','10-2024','11-2024','12-2024')
Group by FinPeriodID
order by 1




select FinPeriodID,COUNT(*) from OUT.CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE
where FinPeriodID IN ('06-2024','07-2024','08-2024','09-2024','10-2024','11-2024','12-2024')
Group by FinPeriodID
order by 1





select count(*) from [OUT].[CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_NEW]
where FinPeriodID in ('06-2024','07-2024','08-2024','09-2024','10-2024','11-2024','12-2024')






select count(*) from [OUT].[CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_NEW_20241217]
where FinPeriodID in ('06-2024','07-2024','08-2024','09-2024','10-2024','11-2024','12-2024')







Select
          AccountCode,AccountClass,AccountDescription,
          CompanyID,Branchcode,
          DepartmentID,Department,
          MarketingAccountID,MarketingAccount,
          ProductID,Product ,
          FinperiodID,LedgerID,
          Sum(BalanceAmount) as BalanceAmount,
        'ETLAdmin'  AS Createdby ,
        Getdate() AS CreatedDatetime,
        Getdate() AS LastModifiedDatetime,
          'IS' as RecordFlag
from [OUT].[CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_STAGE]
     where AccountCode>='60000'  
--and Eomonth(concat(substring(finperiodid,1,charindex('-',finperiodid)),'01-',substring(finperiodid,charindex('-',finperiodid)+1,len(finperiodid))))>=dateadd(M,-6,getdate())
     Group by AccountCode,AccountClass,AccountDescription,
          CompanyID,Branchcode,
          DepartmentID,Department,
          MarketingAccountID,MarketingAccount,
          ProductID,Product ,
          FinperiodID,LedgerID
UNION ALL
 
 
Select  DISTINCT AccountCode,AccountClass,AccountDescription,
          NULL AS CompanyID,
          Branchcode,
        NULL AS DepartmentID,
          NULL AS Department,
          NULL AS MarketingAccountID,
          NULL AS MarketingAccount,
          NULL AS ProductID,
          NULL AS Product,
        FinperiodID,LedgerID,
        Sum(BalanceAmount) Over (Partition by AccountCode,Branchcode,LedgerID
                                 order by  CalendarDate
                                 ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
                                 ) AS EndingBalance,
        'ETLAdmin'  AS Createdby ,
        Getdate() AS CreatedDatetime,
        Getdate() AS LastModifiedDatetime,
        'BS' AS RecordFlag
 
from
OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_ERP_GL_Transaction_STAGE
